hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *pnpm-lock.yaml|*/renovate.json) echo "Refusing to edit $file — managed by Renovate. Let the bot handle dependency bumps." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$file" ] && exit 0; case "$file" in *.astro|*.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.md|*.json|*.css) pnpm exec prettier --write "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; pnpm exec eslint --fix "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
